title: Fresh Flower Pots: 3D
description: Add-on for Fresh Flower Pots that adds support for Vanilla Tweaks 3D mushrooms
body:
![Fresh Flower Pots: 3D Add-on Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e168960b402980258d6a81aac37b75b87e17adbf.png)

## 📜 ABOUT This Add-on for [Fresh Flower Pots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flower-pots) adds support for the 3D mushrooms by Vanilla Tweaks. It is also compatible with [Fresh Flower Pots: Rotated](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flower-pots-rotated).
![Fresh Flower Pots 3D Add-on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad1fd7fa444a370dae4f729501a2156c8f74ac3a.webp)

## ⚙️ INSTALLATION
**1.** Download [Fresh Flower Pots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flower-pots) (and [Fresh Flower Pots: Rotated](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flower-pots-rotated))\ **2.** Download Vanilla Tweaks 3D Mushrooms\ **3.** Download this Add-on\ **4.** Put all packs in the resource packs folder and enable them in-game\ **5.** Make sure the 3D Add-on is above the other packs in the resource packs list
